findings.title: Reports page has no empty state — blank white area with no guidance
findings.rationale: When the Reports section contains no data, the page shows only the 'Reports' heading against a blank white content area. There is no empty state illustration, no explanatory text about what reports are or how to generate them, and no call-to-action directing the user to take the next step. A new user arriving here has no idea what this section does or how to populate it. A well-designed empty state should at minimum explain the feature's purpose and provide a clear next action.

findings.title: Logo image is broken (shows placeholder X pattern)
findings.rationale: A broken image placeholder (typically an X or blank box) is shown where the application logo should appear in the navigation sidebar. This affects brand trust and professional appearance on every page of the app.
